commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Human review is needed because contributor proof remains insufficient and maintainers must either remove or explicitly accept the runtime CDN/security tradeoff before merge.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a concrete supply-chain concern by loading Tailwind from a runtime CDN on the public landing page.; Review finding: [P1] Remove the runtime Tailwind CDN dependency — docs/index.html:53 - [P2] Restore... (sha=761804cb39d3df0a0baecdecebd739586cdadb77)
commands.review_summary:
The branch rewrites the static codexbar.app landing page with a responsive hero and sections, extracted CSS/JS, expanded locale data, an updated locale checker, and new feature/widget/menubar assets.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR blockers: source inspection of the current PR head shows the runtime CDN script in docs/index.html and an undefined copyBrewCommand reference in docs/site.js. I did not need to run the site to establish those defects.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because contributor proof remains insufficient and maintainers must either remove or explicitly accept the runtime CDN/security tradeoff before merge.

target.title: Redesign codexbar.app landing page
target.body:
**Preview:** https://codexbar-redesign-preview.vercel.app

**Screenshots:** [full gallery](https://misty-raven-mwrz.here.now/)

## Summary

- Full visual revamp of the codexbar.app landing: hero with SVG MacBook mockup + live HUD (menubar, popover, meters, chart), responsive mobile/tablet/desktop layouts, feature cards, widgets gallery, CLI section, and 21-locale i18n via `site-locales.mjs`.
- Extracted redesign into `docs/site.css` and `docs/site.js`; `docs/index.html` is now markup-only (~780 lines).
- Baked geometry tunes for desktop (1920), tablet (1001), and mobile (490) with a resize applicator for mockup X and tablet stage height.
- Hero copy animations (staggered reveal + HUD entrance sequence); MacBook frame renders instantly (no fade).
- Feature screenshots compressed to WebP (~16 MB → ~800 KB).
- Cleanup: removed dev tuner, dropped unused raster hero assets and duplicate `openclaw.svg`; canonical mockup is `hero-mockup.svg` (notchless MacBook Air frame, same 6111×3239 artboard).

## Visual QA

### Desktop / main sections

| | |
|---|---|
| **Hero (EN)** — headline, download/brew CTAs, menu-bar HUD mock | ![desktop hero EN](https://misty-raven-mwrz.here.now/01-desktop-hero-en.png) |
| **Providers (EN)** — “53 providers, one menu bar” grid | ![desktop providers EN](https://misty-raven-mwrz.here.now/02-desktop-providers-en.png) |
| **Features (EN)** — resets, credits/spend, status/incidents | ![desktop features EN](https://misty-raven-mwrz.here.now/03-desktop-features-en.png) |
| **CLI (EN)** — terminal output + bundled binary copy | ![desktop CLI EN](https://misty-raven-mwrz.here.now/04-desktop-cli-en.png) |
| **Widgets (EN)** — WidgetKit gallery mock | ![desktop widgets EN](https://misty-raven-mwrz.here.now/05-desktop-widgets-en.png) |
| **More + footer (EN)** — install, CLI, privacy, permissions | ![desktop footer/more EN](https://misty-raven-mwrz.here.now/06-desktop-more-footer-en.png) |

### Locales

| | |
|---|---|
| **Hero (PT-BR)** | ![hero PT](https://misty-raven-mwrz.here.now/07-desktop-hero-pt.png) |
| **Hero (KO)** | ![hero KO](https://misty-raven-mwrz.here.now/08-desktop-hero-ko.png) |
| **Hero (DE)** | ![hero DE desktop](https://misty-raven-mwrz.here.now/09-desktop-hero-de.png) |
| **Hero (CA, narrow)** | ![hero CA narrow](https://misty-raven-mwrz.here.now/16-narrow-hero-ca.png) |

### Responsive viewports

| | |
|---|---|
| **Hero (DE, narrow/tablet)** | ![hero DE narrow](https://misty-raven-mwrz.here.now/10-narrow-hero-de.png) |
| **Hero (DE, narrow focused)** | ![hero DE focused](https://misty-raven-mwrz.here.now/11-narrow-hero-de-focused.png) |
| **Hero (DE, mobile)** | ![mobile hero DE](https://misty-raven-mwrz.here.now/12-mobile-hero-de.png) |
| **Hero (EN, mobile)** | ![mobile hero EN](https://misty-raven-mwrz.here.now/13-mobile-hero-en.png) |
| **Providers (EN, mobile)** | ![mobile providers EN](https://misty-raven-mwrz.here.now/14-mobile-providers-en.png) |
| **Features (EN, mobile)** | ![mobile features EN](https://misty-raven-mwrz.here.now/15-mobile-features-en.png) |

## Review notes

- Geometry constants are baked in `:root` CSS vars + `applyHeroDesktopLayout()`; tuned values are documented in `site.js` / `site.css`.
- `Scripts/check-site-locales.mjs` validates locale parity and provider logo assets.

## Test plan

- [ ] Desktop 1440/1920: hero overlay, HUD alignment, providers grid, features, widgets, CLI, footer
- [ ] Tablet ~1001px: MacBook right margin, hero copy padding, popover position
- [ ] Mobile ≤768: stacked hero, full-bleed stage, right-anchored MacBook, brew pill, header controls
- [ ] Dark + light theme toggle
- [ ] Spot-check locales: en, pt-BR, pl, ar (RTL)
- [ ] `node Scripts/check-site-locales.mjs`
target.author: vyctorbrzezowski
